⟨ M E D I N A ⟩

"Totum in se. Nihil externum." — Everything within. Nothing external.
φ = 1.618033988749895 · 7 Native Scripts · 20 Extensions · 3 SDKs · 216 Workers · 50 Memory Ops

⬇ INSTALL — INSTALLATIO SOVEREIGNA

Linux / macOS — One Command

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FreddyCreates/Medina-Memory-More-AI/main/dist/install.sh | bash
Or download and run locally — no network needed after download.

Windows — PowerShell

iwr https://raw.githubusercontent.com/FreddyCreates/Medina-Memory-More-AI/main/dist/install.ps1 | iex

From Sovereign Bundle (Offline)

tar xzf medina-sovereign-1.0.0.tar.gz cd medina-sovereign-1.0.0 bash install.sh
Zero network dependency. Everything self-contained.

npm (SDK only)

npm install @medina/memory-sdk @medina/organism-cli

⚡ NATIVE SCRIPTS — SCRIPTA NATIVA

No GitHub Actions. Everything runs locally via make or npm run.

CommandShortcutPurpose
make validate npm run validate Validate all substrates (ICP, Node.js, Rust, Extensions)
make build npm run build:extensions Package all 20 extensions + build release bundle
make deploy-canister-local npm run deploy:canister Deploy Motoko canister to local ICP replica
make deploy-canister-ic npm run deploy:canister:ic Deploy to ICP mainnet
make publish-sdk npm run publish:sdk Publish SDK packages to npm
make dev npm run dev Launch Organism CLI auto-pilot + download server
make build-rust npm run build:rust Build medina_crypto Rust crate

⟺ DUALITY ENGINE — 8 OPPOSING PAIRS

"Omnis actio habet reactionem." — Every action has its reaction.

emit →
⇌
← absorb
activate →
⟺
← deactivate
affirm →
✓✗
← deny
energize →
1|0
← zero
expand →
⟨⟩
← contract
surface →
↕
← deepen
link →
⊶
← unlink
reinforce →
∞∅
← forget

🏛 COMPONENTS — MEMBRA SYSTEMATIS

🏛️ ICP Canister
Motoko backend — Memory Temple, Constitution, 50+ Memory ops, 200+ endpoints
Substrate: Internet Computer · Language: Motoko
🧬 Organism CLI
Terminal AI — 216 Alpha workers, 30 terminals, 3 conductor AIs, auto-pilot
Runtime: Node.js · Port: 3618
🧩 20 Extensions
Browser extensions — Memory Temple, Three Hearts, Golden Ratio, Intelligence Wire
Platform: Chrome/Chromium · Auto-load via CLI
📦 Memory SDK
@medina/memory-sdk — Sovereign memory temple, lineage tracking, phi-traced persistence
Package: npm · License: ISIL-1.0
🤖 Agent Incentive
Agent incentive service — reward models, phi-scaled incentives
Package: npm · License: ISIL-1.0
🛒 AI Tools Marketplace
Callable tool marketplace — 20 tools with I/O schemas, cost weights
Package: npm · License: ISIL-1.0
🦀 Rust Crate
medina_crypto — Sovereign cryptographic primitives
Language: Rust · Crate: medina_crypto
📜 Doctrine
Constitution, alignment docs, pattern synthesis, research papers
Format: Markdown · Immutable doctrine

🕍 MEMORY TEMPLE — 50 OPERATIONS

Core (14)
init · store · get · find · pin · unpin · promote · memoriesAtRing · memoriesInBeatRange · lineage · status · count · toXYZ · distance
Extended (19)
consolidate · archive · archiveBelowSalience · decay · decayAll · children · descendants · nearestTo · updateContent · updateTags · replay · mapTopology · salienceDistribution · topSalient · decayCandidates · memoriesByType · typeDistribution · memoriesByState · fullStatus
Duality Engine (17)
emit · absorb · activate · deactivate · affirm · deny · energize · zero · expand · contract · surface · deepen · link · unlink · reinforce · forget · dualityManifest
Alfredo "Freddy" Medina Hernandez · Medina Tech · Dallas, TX
φ = 1.618033988749895 · Sovereign Intelligence · ISIL-1.0
